title: Senate Republican Leader Shannon Grove (R-Bakersfield) responds to the release of secondary audit results by the non-partisan State Auditor on the mismanaged Employment Development
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The secondary audit results documented egregious failures of the EDD to prevent fraud.",
    "The EDD took six months to become serious in deterring fraud in the unemployment insurance system.",
    "The EDD did not have a process in place to unfreeze unemployment claims once deemed not fraudulent.",
    "The failures of the EDD resulted in over $10 billion in fraudulent claims being paid.",
    "Almost $1 billion of the fraudulent claims were sent to incarcerated individuals.",
    "The auditor recommended that EDD regularly cross-match its claims with inmate data.",
    "Senator Grove introduced legislation (SB 39) to mandate the cross-checking of prisoner information with unemployment claims.",
    "A major unemployment fraud scheme was operating in and around California’s prisons."
  ]
}
```
